title: Sun Pharma’s deal to buy Merck-spinoff Organon ticks the right box on acquisition cost if not R&D
description: Sun Pharma’s acquisition of US-based Organon looks like a financial bargain for the global scale and market access it offers. But the Indian drugmaker may need to look elsewhere for an R&amp;D boost that could put it at the cutting edge of healthcare.
